claim: ADR-0001 declares `supersedes: 0003`, but no ADR-0003 exists in its own directory (`a/`); a same-numbered ADR exists in `z/`.
consequence: A bare ADR number is directory-scoped by default (ADR-0008), so this reference does not resolve to the same-numbered ADR in another directory — write an explicit path, or declare `numbering: global` if numbers are unique across the whole log and a cross-directory supersession is intended.
